note: Upload this file to the root of the aptechserv-ux/GANDIVA-Guide repo. Add new cases by appending to the 'cases' array. Change 'active' to false to hide a case without deleting it.

cases.offense: 📍 Man missing 4 years. Family had given up hope. No digital history.
cases.what_happened: IO ran ER Search on name alone. NATGRID returned Mumbai address and PAN. CDR confirmed he was active in Mumbai.
cases.result: IO traveled to Mumbai. Found missing person working at a hotel. Reunited with family after 4 years.

cases.offense: 📍 NBWs from 1992 pending. No digital history. Only old photographs.
cases.what_happened: Old FIR photos uploaded to Gandiva Image Search. System returned matches and alternate numbers. CDR revealed current locations of all 4 accused.
cases.result: All four accused traced. 30-year-old NBWs executed in 2025.

cases.offense: 📍 Only image available. No mobile number on record.
cases.what_happened: Image uploaded to Gandiva. Father's name from match. MEA retrieved passport. BOI confirmed accused had returned to India.
cases.result: 41A notice issued. Full chain: Image → MEA → BOI.

cases.offense: 🚗 Vehicle details available. Driver fled after accident.
cases.what_happened: FASTag and toll plaza data analyzed through NATGRID to track vehicle movement after accident.
cases.result: Accused identified via FASTag-based route mapping and apprehended.

cases.case_title: ATM Robbery — Vehicle Tracked Across India ✅ CONVICTED
cases.offense: 🚛 Container truck used to steal ATM. CCTV captured plate.
cases.what_happened: MoRTH ID'd truck owner. NHAI FASTag mapped route: Amakatadu → Gooty → Maroor toll plazas northward. CDR + IMEI tracked driver to Hosur. All 4 arrested at Rajasthan dhaba.
cases.result: CONVICTED 29.04.2025 · JMFC Kurnool · 3 yrs RI + Rs.14,000 fine each. NATGRID-to-conviction in 4 months.

cases.case_title: NDPS — A3 Traced via CDR IMEI Chain
cases.offense: 💊 A4–A6 arrested, confessed A3's number. All numbers switched off.
cases.what_happened: IMEI analysis found A3 had switched to new SIM. New number submitted for live location. Gandiva confirmed identity at 100% match.
cases.result: A3 identified and arrested. Model case for IMEI-based tracing in NDPS.

cases.case_title: Murder for Gain — Full Network via Vehicle
cases.offense: 🚛 Ashok Leyland Tipper used. CCTV captured it.
cases.what_happened: MoRTH returned owner. Owner disclosed sale to A7. ER Search returned photo + alternates. Tower dump cross-referenced with CDR. All accused identified.
cases.result: Vehicle ownership chain established. All accused identified. Charge sheet filed.

cases.offense: 💊 Odisha accused — photo uploaded to Gandiva. PAN returned.
cases.what_happened: IO wrote to Income Tax, Odisha using NATGRID PAN. Financial investigation confirmed property from ganja trade.
cases.result: Rs.42.7 lakh property seized — entirely through NATGRID-derived PAN data.

cases.case_title: Rs.35–40 Crore Cheating — Accused in Dubai
cases.offense: 💰 Accused fled to Dubai after massive fraud.
cases.what_happened: IO used NATGRID with phone, passport, PAN, email. MEA confirmed passport. BOI returned exit to Dubai. Financial trail documented.
cases.result: Confirmed in Dubai. Red Notice via Bharatpol initiated using NATGRID passport data.

cases.case_title: Digital Arrest Fraud — Rs.12L Extorted (14 Accused)
cases.offense: 📱 Fraudsters posed as Supreme Court officials. Rs.12 lakh extorted.
cases.what_happened: IP logs from Amazon Pay → 94 BNSS notice → Jio IPDR → IMEI → ER Search. Full network A1–A14 mapped.
cases.result: All 14 accused arrested and remanded using NATGRID-derived data.

cases.cr_number: Cr.No.91/2024 · Chinna Chowk PS, YSR Kadapa
cases.case_title: Cheating — Accused Confirmed Still in India
cases.offense: 💰 Accused suspected to have fled abroad.
cases.what_happened: MEA confirmed passport. BOI showed NO recent exit. CBDT returned financial address. Accused confirmed still in India.
cases.result: Arrested using NATGRID address. Misdirected international manhunt avoided.

cases.case_title: Online Abusive Content — ID'd from One Photo
cases.offense: 📱 Only a social media profile image available.
cases.what_happened: IO uploaded profile photo to Gandiva. System returned phone number and colony address. Identity confirmed via field verification.
cases.result: Accused identified within hours. Legal action within 24 hours — one photograph.
